question: Will Apple announce Vision Pro 2 (or any new Vision Pro hardware) at WWDC 2026 (June 8-12)?
reason: Apple has no plans to announce new Vision Pro hardware at WWDC 2026.
evidence: Apple's roadmap doesn't currently call for a second-generation model until the end of 2026.
Apple is focusing on developing smart glasses, with the Vision Pro team reassigned to other projects.
Reports suggest Apple has discontinued development of the Vision Pro headset.
Apple has no plans to launch a second-generation Vision Pro headset until the end of 2026.
Apple is focusing on developing smart glasses, with the Vision Pro team reassigned to other projects.
